metadata.description: A person in their 40s, appearing female, has olive skin with subtle fine lines around the eyes and forehead. Their face is oval with a softly defined jawline. Dark brown, tightly coiled, medium-length curly hair frames the face, with a natural hairline. The eyes are a warm amber color and almond-shaped, set slightly wide apart. Eyebrows are medium thickness and gently arched. The nose has a straight bridge and a slightly rounded tip. Lips are medium thickness and form a gentle, closed smile. A few small moles are visible on the face and neck. The person has a warm, inviting expression, with their head angled slightly to the left.
metadata.anchor: Warm amber eyes and tightly coiled dark hair.
